mnemonics: CAPACITY vs PERFORMANCE: Capacity is the size of your car's gas tank (how much work it can handle), Performance is how fast your car goes (speed of completing work).
keyPoints: Capacity Planning focuses on resource quantity and scalability
Performance Management focuses on speed, efficiency, and responsiveness
They are related but address different aspects of system health
commonMistakes: Treating capacity and performance as the same metric
Focusing only on performance without planning for future capacity needs
Assuming good performance means adequate capacity for growth
